queries.question: Can you find all internship topics?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?industry_sector a :Industry_Sector .
  ?industry_sector p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Can you find all internship topics?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name2 WHERE {
  ?project_name a :Project_Name .
  ?project_name p:project_name ?project_name2 .
}

queries.question: Can you find all internship topics?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    project_name, name
FROM 
    Industry_Sector
JOIN
    Internship ON Internship.industry_sector_id = Industry_Sector.id
JOIN
  Project_Name ON Internship.project_id = Project_Name.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name2 ?name WHERE {
  ?industry_sector a :Industry_Sector .
  ?internship a :Internship .
  ?internship p:hasIndustry_Sector ?industry_sector .
  ?project_name a :Project_Name .
  ?internship p:hasProject_Name ?project_name .
  ?project_name p:project_name ?project_name2 .
  ?industry_sector p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: List the students and their project names.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Internship.student_id, 
    Project_Name.project_name
FROM 
    Project_Name
JOIN
    Internship ON Internship.project_id = Project_Name.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?student_id ?project_name2 WHERE {
  ?project_name a :Project_Name .
  ?internship a :Internship .
  ?internship p:hasProject_Name ?project_name .
  ?internship p:student_id ?student_id .
  ?project_name p:project_name ?project_name2 .
}

queries.question: List the students and their industry sectors.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Internship.student_id, 
    Industry_Sector.name
FROM 
    Industry_Sector
JOIN
    Internship ON Internship.industry_sector_id = Industry_Sector.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?student_id ?name WHERE {
  ?industry_sector a :Industry_Sector .
  ?internship a :Internship .
  ?internship p:hasIndustry_Sector ?industry_sector .
  ?internship p:student_id ?student_id .
  ?industry_sector p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show me the students along with their internship topics.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Internship.student_id, 
    Industry_Sector.name,
    Project_Name.project_name
FROM 
    Industry_Sector
JOIN
    Internship ON Internship.industry_sector_id = Industry_Sector.id
JOIN
 Project_Name ON Internship.project_id = Project_Name.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?student_id ?name ?project_name2 WHERE {
  ?industry_sector a :Industry_Sector .
  ?internship a :Internship .
  ?internship p:hasIndustry_Sector ?industry_sector .
  ?project_name a :Project_Name .
  ?internship p:hasProject_Name ?project_name .
  ?internship p:student_id ?student_id .
  ?industry_sector p:name ?name .
  ?project_name p:project_name ?project_name2 .
}
